positive: A mystical, symmetrical bioluminescent forest scene. Central focus on massive, stylized flora (giant glowing mushrooms, abstract root systems, luminous vines) intersecting with celestial elements. The composition should be designed as a seamless, high-contrast pattern suitable for apparel print. Use a deep indigo and cosmic teal color palette, accented by neon glowing accents (cyan, electric magenta). The style is a combination of psychedelic Art Nouveau engraving and detailed scientific illustration. Emphasize strong, clean silhouettes and intricate, repeating patterns. Cinematic, symmetrical composition, 8k, detailed linework, clean edges.
